subject: Friend, Mitch McConnell's days as Majority Leader are numbered

We just need to elect Jon in Georgia. |

Friend,

**Mitch McConnell's days as Senate Majority Leader are numbered.**

Control of the U.S. Senate is looking like it will come down to Georgia -- _and Jon Ossoff has all the momentum!_

He's surging in the polls, and experts have upgraded the race in his favor.

**But for Jon to win this race and remove McConnell from power, we need to raise $100,000 by the end of the month.**

_Friend, that's _three days away_!_

**[Before August is over, will you chip in $10, $20, or ANY AMOUNT to retake the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24d0/5b2c1286/3ff96e43/25f03d8a/628744162/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_28_eom_mitch?refcode=em_2020_08_28_eom_mitch")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: My friend Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
In the short time I spent with Joe Biden, I could tell he really saw me. I could tell he actually cared -- that my life meant something to him. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B5_jacquelyn_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B5_jacquelyn_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter, I take powerful people up in my elevator all the time. When they get off, they go to their important meetings. But me? I just head back to the lobby.

But in the short time I spent with Joe Biden, I could tell he really saw me. I could tell he actually cared -- that my life meant something to him.

And I knew that, even as he went into his important meeting, he'd take my story with him.

That's because Joe Biden has room in his heart for more than just _himself_.

We've been through a lot, and we have tough days ahead -- but electing someone like that, someone like Joe, is a good place to start.

**That 's why I was proud to nominate my friend Joe Biden to be our next President last week, and why I'm reaching out now before his huge end-of-month deadline. Joe's team tells me they still need to bring in $405,000 from Pennsylvania to hit their big goal for Monday night, so they need our help to cross the finish line.**

[This campaign isn't about Joe, Peter. It's about us. And if you can spare it today, will you chip in $25 to go towards Joe and Kamala's first public fundraising deadline and to invest in a better future for us and everyone we care about?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B5_jacquelyn_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B5_jacquelyn_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Our country is hurting, and people have lost so much to this pandemic -- but President Trump doesn't seem to care.

He can tell whatever lies he wants, but I remember what he said when it came to Americans losing their lives to this virus: _" it is what it is."_

And I remember when white supremacists marched on Charlottesville, he said there were _" very fine people on both sides."_

**Politics aside, this election is about electing someone who actually cares -- period. It 's about putting a person in the Oval Office who really sees us and gets out of bed and fights for us every day.**

I know that Joe Biden will be that person, Peter, because he _saw_ me in the elevator that day, and I saw his heart.

[So please, I'm asking you -- if you can do one thing today to send Joe Biden to the White House to fight for us before you stop reading this email, will you chip in $25 or whatever you can spare to make sure Joe doesn't fall short on his end-of-month goal?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B5_jacquelyn_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B5_jacquelyn_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks for reading, Peter. I can't wait for the day we get to call my friend President-Elect Joe Biden.

_\- Jacquelyn_

Politics aside, this election is about electing someone who actually cares -- period. It 's about putting a person in the Oval Office who really sees us and gets out of bed and fights for us every day. I know that Joe Biden will be that person, Peter, because he saw me in the elevator that day, and I saw his heart. "" Thanks for reading, Peter. I can't wait for the day we get to call my friend President-Elect Joe Biden. \- Jacquelyn | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:

body:

|

| | Peter, I wanted to make sure we're on the right track ahead of our big end-of-month goal so I've been doing some number crunching.

There's one calculation that made me check my work -- twice. I've never been great at math, so that's not surprising, but when I realized my calculations were actually correct, well... my jaw dropped. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc2/7f51f7bc/43b54a99/4efae847/3741628364/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-150k?refcode=email_20200828.1nd__2018__&amount=10")
---
This is just staggering. Since the runoff election, an additional 84,000+ donors have joined our team. That means we now have 140,046 individuals fueling our grassroots campaign!

My first reaction is, WOW, followed closely by _THANK YOU!_

This team is unstoppable thanks to folks like you. If you've been waiting for the right moment to pitch in -- it's right now! We've set a goal of bringing on 150,000 donors before August ends!

[**Will you make your first donation now to help crush our end-of-month goal?***](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc2/7f51f7bc/43b54a99/4efae847/3741628364/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-150k?refcode=email_20200828.1nd__2018__&amount=10")

There's no holding us back if we keep up this momentum, team.
Thanks,

Leah
Digital Director
MJ for Texas

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

name: Corky Messner
subject: “We need Corky!” - President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
President Trump’s first stop after accepting the nomination was New Hampshire because he knows how important our state is! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/25a129bfcdbd2810c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Last night, Donald Trump held his first campaign event after accepting the nomination at the Republican National Convention, and he chose to have it in our great state of New Hampshire. He knows how nervous the Democrats are of losing their Senate seat, and he’s fighting back hard to help me defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen this November. **I was honored to get a special shout-out from President Trump from the podium. He specifically said, “We need Corky!”** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/b33dd57f9d9226fdc3d6b838967d376c/33153) _He’s right._ I need to win this race because we need to keep our Senate majority. The Dems are desperate to win it back, and they are doing everything they can to prop up Senator Shaheen for her reelection bid. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/0732e42a7cbc469dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) But I know that Granite Staters are sick of politics as usual. I know they are ready for real change, and a principled leader who will fight for their rights in Washington. I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, proud to welcome to him to our wonderful state, and I’ll be a proud ally to him in Washington. I know that we can Keep America Great, but only if we defeat Jeanne Shaheen in 2020 and flip this seat RED. **Will you please chip in what you can right now to help us fight the Democrat machine in New Hampshire? President Trump knows how important it is — that’s why he made the Granite State his first stop after the convention**. [DONATE $5 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/4e06cf61e6b79016c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $10 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/52428e88af7a9fd5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $25 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/11aac38be20362b3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $50 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/fc44ce6e866c7cf4c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $100 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/b1ca99a62e03f43fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Please chip in today to help support my campaign and support President Trump. Together, we’re going to Keep America Great! Thanks,
Corky Messner [DONATE NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/492471b168b469b6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/d66b049af19d2446c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9df778f2c5c3a69c/cdd33e4a991c0087c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

I’m inspired by the idea of advocating for those who have been left out on the margins for far too long, that’s why I’m registering voters to increase Democratic turnout to levels unheard of in the formerly-bright-red Texas.
Honestly, it’s a fact that Democrats can win in Texas, I proved it by bringing Ted Cruz so close to defeat in 2018. If we rally around strong candidates with aspirational visions for our country, _**we’re unbeatable.**_
But Republicans are going to try. **They’re already rallying around Republican Michael McCaul with dark money ad buys and transparent attacks on Mike’s character.**
If Mike is going to take this momentum through to Election Day despite Republican attacks, he NEEDS our help. clean_body: | | = Peter, one thing is for sure, Texas is on the verge of flipping BLUE. And if we want to push our state over the edge, we need to send a SURGE of support to Democrats running in battleground districts. I could not be prouder to support Mike Siegel in TX-10 — he’s running a bold, progressive campaign that is centered around the folks that Texas Republicans have left behind. I know that in Congress, he’ll let his compassion, with the help of science, guide his decision making. And he’ll always protect working families over special interests — that’s why he’s rejecting corporate PAC money in favor of a people-powered movement. We’re doing the necessary work to flip Texas, but we need your help to fund it. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m inspired by the idea of advocating for those who have been left out on the margins for far too long, that’s why I’m registering voters to increase Democratic turnout to levels unheard of in the formerly-bright-red Texas. Honestly, it’s a fact that Democrats can win in Texas, I proved it by bringing Ted Cruz so close to defeat in 2018. If we rally around strong candidates with aspirational visions for our country, we’re unbeatable. But Republicans are going to try. name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: March on Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Newsletter%20Header.png]
Dear Peter,

Fifty-seven years ago, protestors struggling for equality and justice made their mark on American history, forever bending the arc of our moral universe more toward justice. In August 1963, Martin Luther King Jr., John Lewis, Diane Nash, and a quarter million patriots descended upon the Lincoln Memorial for the March on Washington, a pilgrimage made for justice, equality under the law, and the fulfillment of America's promise that all men and women are created equal. On that day in our nation's capitol, these organizers, activists, and icons called on the American people to join them in their struggle.

March on Washington [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/March_on_washington_Aug_28_1963_700w.jpg]

This weekend, to celebrate the 57th anniversary of the March on Washington, a new generation of organizers and activists have once again gathered on the National Mall. Supported by the NAACP, National Urban League, Lawyer's Committee for Civil Rights Under the Law, and so many others, the people-powered events this weekend will urge all Americans to not only join the struggle, but redouble our efforts to ensure dignified and equitable treatment in the public structures and systems that make up our civil society - law enforcement, housing, public education, the justice system, and so many more.

The reasons why another March is crucial after so much time can't be missed, but here are two of the most recent:

• In Kenosha, Wisconsin: Peaceful black protesters are attacked, corralled, gassed and shot at with rubber bullets while a white kid openly carrying a weapon of war is rewarded with encouraging words and a bottle of water.

• In Nashville, Tennessee: Black protestors who protest by sleeping on state house grounds are now felons while a white man carrying a weapon of war in the streets of Nashville is cited for a misdemeanor.

We offer solidarity with the protesters in Washington and across the country and we pledge to stand with them and continue the fight towards a more perfect union that was started 57 years ago this weekend. Fifty-seven years after the March on Washington, the message is the same, we need to restore the Soul of America - and we need to vote this November to do so.

In Good Trouble,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

TWEETS OF THE WEEK
https://twitter.com/rosariodawson/status/1299120033118007298 [https://twitter.com/rosariodawson/status/1299120033118007298]
https://twitter.com/brandon4tenn/status/1299365898537627652?s=21 [https://twitter.com/brandon4tenn/status/1299365898537627652?s=21]
https://twitter.com/GlennforSenate/status/1299335985843572739 [https://twitter.com/GlennforSenate/status/1299335985843572739]

CHIP IN TO TURN OUT THE VOTE
In 2018 Tennessee Democratic voter turnout increased in all 95 counties - in some places as much as 25%. With the right investment and messaging strategy we know we can flip seats in November. Targeted media will help mobilize Democrats to vote, vote early, and vote safely - but we need help covering costs.

We’ve already assembled an amazing team to help us Get Out The Vote and support our diverse and talented roster of candidates. Now we need to focus on voter turnout. Targeted messaging and media are more critical than ever because of COVID-19. The GOP thinks that they have Tennessee on lock but we’re going to prove them wrong.

Will you make a donation right now, and help us pay for the media strategy needed to flip these crucial seats? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

|

| | Hi friend, This November, we’ll be voting in the most important election of our lifetimes. This isn’t just about the White House, but ensuring that President Biden has the support he needs to undo the damage of the last four years and get America moving in the right direction. For too long, I’ve been the lone representative fighting for Kentucky families in Congress, and this year we have a real chance of sending a real leader to join me. Josh Hicks is ready to deliver real change to our commonwealth and country. Josh Hicks can win. [_**But he needs our help. Will you join me in contributing to Josh’s campaign to flip the 6th District?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18906693/243433346/-1374493477?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200829EOM4_Yarmuth_all_xx_xx_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODU3Y2E2Mi0wOGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3X3CqGeoQop63DIi_ARE_oN3BBXAFAvpR_luA_RDQy8=) Josh is a former Marine and police officer, and a dedicated community servant from rural Kentucky. Josh knows what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet, and to make sacrifices to provide a better life for his family. He’s running in a district Democrats nearly flipped in 2018 — we came within just 3% of winning that race two years ago. And polls indicate that it’s ready to turn blue this year. Josh is running a people-powered campaign. He’s rejected corporate PAC donations, and is building his campaign one grassroots volunteer, contributor, and voter at a time — and he needs you on his team. I’m supporting Josh Hicks for Kentucky’s 6th District, and I hope you will too. [_**Can you join Josh’s campaign today, and make a donation?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18906694/243433347/-1374493477?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200829EOM4_Yarmuth_all_xx_xx_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODU3Y2E2Mi0wOGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3X3CqGeoQop63DIi_ARE_oN3BBXAFAvpR_luA_RDQy8=) I need Josh’s help in Congress, and we all need another voice fighting for Kentucky families. That’s why it’s so important that we work together to get Josh elected. I hope you’ll join me in supporting Josh’s campaign today and getting him across the finish line on November 3! Thank you, John [**__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18906695/243433348/-7519671?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200814TVad1_JH_all_xx_xx_atest_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODU3Y2E2Mi0wOGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3X3CqGeoQop63DIi_ARE_oN3BBXAFAvpR_luA_RDQy8=) | | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18906696/243433349/295769104?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200829EOM4_Yarmuth_all_xx_xx_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODU3Y2E2Mi0wOGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3X3CqGeoQop63DIi_ARE_oN3BBXAFAvpR_luA_RDQy8=)

Friend,

As Eugene’s Deputy Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure we meet each and every goal between now and Election Day. In a race this competitive, our election could very well be decided by a handful of votes, so I mean it when I say that every penny matters.

clean_body: Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Alexis’ email yesterday. With just 66 days left until Election Day, we can’t take anything for granted. Whether or not we meet every last one of these fundraising goals could be a deciding factor in our ability to win this race. Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Alexis’ email yesterday. With just 66 days left until Election Day, we can’t take anything for granted. Whether or not we meet every last one of these fundraising goals could be a deciding factor in our ability to win this race. We still need to raise $14,091 to reach our end-of-month goal and move into this final stretch of our campaign in the strongest position possible. I would greatly appreciate anything you can pitch in to help us meet this important fundraising deadline. = Thanks, Eugene Sent from my iPhone On Fri, Aug 28, 2020 at 6:01 PM Alexis Gonzaludo wrote: = Hey team, Earlier this week, we shared that two massive special interest groups are blanketing PA-10 with over a million dollars in TV ads in the coming weeks. This type of outside influence makes it that much more important that we’re staying on track with our finance plan so we can continue taking Eugene’s message directly to voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **********=******** | | ********=******** | | ********=******** | | ********=******** | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- As Eugene’s Deputy Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure we meet each and every goal between now and Election Day. In a race this competitive, our election could very well be decided by a handful of votes, so I mean it when I say that every penny matters. Team, each= contribution adds up in a big way.** Your grassroots support is what helps keep our TV on ads on the air, our digital ads running online, and ensures we have the tools to continue contacting voters through mailings, phone banking, and texting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alexis Alexis Gonzaludo Deputy Finance Director Eugene for Congress We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: Martin Sheen
subject: Reaching out to you today about Rita Hart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhG7dJuoib1dhxIlodu_bWMYbEFNalL6ur_H8bi7Byk=/q9hkFTa0EIFpWSU350TrPuqdub4ewhPwaishjdkg0V4=?refcode=200829-email) Hello Peter, My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet on _The West Wing_. I don't have the kind of (_fictional_) power that I used to have as a (_fictional)_ president. But I've devoted my life outside of acting to political activism by doing everything I can to support the causes and candidates that I believe in, like Rita Hart. Peter, it's not every day that you meet a candidate like Rita Hart. She is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in _The West Wing_ 's best moments -- inspiring, hard working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results. **[Right now, I'm reaching out to you because Rita Hart has an important fundraising deadline coming up on the 31st. Will you join me in supporting at this key moment in her campaign by chipping in $20?](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhG7dJuoib1dhxIlodu_bWMYbEFNalL6ur_H8bi7Byk=/q9hkFTa0EIFpWSU350TrPuqdub4ewhPwaishjdkg0V4=?refcode=200829-email&amount=20)** | ******[Rush a donation to support Rita Hart!](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhG7dJuoib1dhxIlodu_bWMYbEFNalL6ur_H8bi7Byk=/q9hkFTa0EIFpWSU350TrPuqdub4ewhPwaishjdkg0V4=?refcode=200829-email)******
---
If it's not personal it's impersonal, and as such no one cares. So to get a little personal, politics to me is about hope. It's about our children being able to experience a brighter, more just tomorrow because of what we fight for today. And that starts with voting.
Elections are a time where we come together as a country to decide whether or not the politics of our present represent who we are as Americans or if we've gone too far off track. In 2018, it was the American people who decided that enough was enough and elected one of the most diverse freshman classes into the House of Representatives.
And now, as we inch closer to November 2020, perhaps the most consequential election of our lifetimes, we are once again taking our voices to the ballot box. And, I can't picture a better person to represent IA-02 than Rita Hart.
Rita Hart's determination, and commitment to fighting for IA-02 is evident in her career and her character. She will bring values that are sorely needed to Washington and work to make life better for IA-02.
**[I've never run for office. But I've seen a lot of campaigns up close, so I know it's not easy. Rita Hart needs all the support we can give her to win her election in November, so we can't let her miss a single fundraising deadline between now and then. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhG7dJuoib1dhxIlodu_bWMYbEFNalL6ur_H8bi7Byk=/q9hkFTa0EIFpWSU350TrPuqdub4ewhPwaishjdkg0V4=?refcode=200829-email)**
Thank you,
Martin Sheen

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhG7dJuoib1dhxIlodu_bWMYbEFNalL6ur_H8bi7Byk=/q9hkFTa0EIFpWSU350TrPuqdub4ewhPwaishjdkg0V4=?refcode=200829-email)

******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhG7dJuoib1dhxIlodu_bWMYbEFNalL6ur_H8bi7Byk=/q9hkFTa0EIFpWSU350TrPuqdub4ewhPwaishjdkg0V4=?refcode=200829-email)******
---

P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States

name: Seth Moulton
subject: A direct ask ahead of my primary on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, My primary election is on Tuesday and I need your help, but first let me tell you why:
1. I want to continue my work in Congress speaking up for our communities, supporting our veterans, battling the mental health and opioid crises, and working towards common-sense solutions on the biggest issues facing our country.
2. I want to continue fighting for our District and the rest of our beautiful state.
3. This is a bizarre election cycle and we can’t afford risking a Trump-approved Republican winning this seat.

[**It’s essential that I win this election, but we can’t take anything for granted. Will you make a contribution to my re-election campaign to make sure I stay in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18908529/243461212/2005830277?refcode=20200829_SM_Primary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjM2ZDVhMC0xMGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNdhNhfLehSyMq1qLbpPYfA4ssBqOmR5B79NsRrEm4Q=) This has been one of the strangest election cycles I can remember. Instead of talking with voters face to face, shaking hands, and meeting new people, I’ve been on non-stop Zoom calls—like most of the rest of the world. It’s been difficult to connect and especially difficult to get the word out about our September 1st elections. I’m asking for your help today to make sure I can return to Congress and continue my work on behalf of you, your neighbors, and all of the constituents of the Sixth District. I need your help to make sure I can keep battling the opioid crisis, building a coalition to make real progress on climate change, ensuring everyone has health care as a right, and fighting for investments and good jobs across our District. [**Now’s the time to finish this race as strong as possible. Please contribute whatever is meaningful to you right now ahead of my primary on subject: Check out Linda's new campaign video >>

Last week, Linda officially launched her re-election campaign to represent California's 38th district!
**With that, comes a brand-new campaign video![Find out exactly what Linda stands for by watching the video below >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/MluB7YWP_nQ5Ug47MAA7pGS6HH8RgMe8g5SzjRZvQo8=/Yh0GDzFmU_bD6zKgc0O-PNTU0xYYJyp4OBvaruTQc-M=?refcode=X_082930_EOM_D)**

In Congress, Linda fights for _real_ policies that will **directly** impact the working families of CA-38 -- like affordable childcare, lowering prescription drug prices, and protecting our essential workers.
Linda knows we've got our work cut out for us if we're going to protect the environment, keep our communities healthy, and end racial injustice -- but she's never been one to sit in the dugout.
[**Help Linda hit the ball out of the park on November 3rd | Make a Donation >**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MluB7YWP_nQ5Ug47MAA7pGS6HH8RgMe8g5SzjRZvQo8=/Yh0GDzFmU_bD6zKgc0O-PNTU0xYYJyp4OBvaruTQc-M=?refcode=X_082930_EOM_D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gov.=20Jim=20Douglas?=
subject: Phil needs our support
body:
He's had our back, let's have his |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fa9dff6456&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| I know what it’s like to serve as Governor through tough times. Back in 2008, when the world faced its most significant financial crisis since the Great Depression, my team and I worked around the clock to respond. Today, Governor Phil Scott is managing our state through a once-in-a-century public health challenge and the economic fallout it has left in its wake. His strong leadership has helped make Vermont one of the safest states in the nation and we’re fortunate to have his steady hand on the wheel. On top of everything Phil is dealing with, we’re just a few weeks away from when Vermonters will begin casting their ballots in the General Election. Phil has been clear that his top priority is doing the job he was elected to do: leading our state -- not campaigning. But he needs our help, [so I offered to pitch in](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=91a1c56820&e=19cebfe173).

For three years before this crisis hit, and especially since it began, Governor Scott has been the leader Vermont needs. **We simply cannot afford a change in leadership right now, and his opponent has been raising money and campaigning for months. ** **[We need to make sure Phil has the resources he needs to win this race.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5d5b5b23ec&e=19cebfe173) ** Can I count on you to [chip in $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can spare to ensure Phil wins in November](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d93c0617ae&e=19cebfe173)? He’s had our backs and now it's our turn to have his. Thank you for your consideration. On to victory in November! **Gov. Jim Douglas
80th Governor of Vermont**
---
| [Contribute](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f73ebb9865&e=19cebfe173 "Contribute")

Hey Friend --

It’s Matt, Sri’s finance director. I just wanted to forward you all this short memo I shared with our team at our virtual budget meeting this morning to show you exactly where we stand and what we need to do.

If you can take the suggested action, we’ll be able to stay on track with our goal.

[**Link to take that action now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18910545/243497209/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.29_MG_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGVhNWU2OC0xY2VhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nN-seMDEl85dUPdS5pYmrnTmupJTUIm-a8mhTeez9Ug=)

Matt Gaze
Finance Director
Team Sri
|
**TWO-MONTH PLAN OF ACTION**

_In advance of the November 3 election, our team will be rolling out messaging and organizing initiatives across television, social media, and phones/mail for direct voter outreach.

We’ve been fundraising for this phase for most of August, and with grassroots support, we can meet the goals we’ve set and start executing our two-month plan. Given the $6.4 million ad buy from the Republican Super PACs in this race, we need to launch sooner rather than later -- so meeting these goals will be critical if we want to roll out our initiatives by early September as planned._

**_Here’s where we stand:_

FUNDRAISING DEADLINE: August 31, 2020 at MIDNIGHT
Days left until the election: 66 days
Fundraising goal: $59,000 (80.57% completed)

_[Make a suggested donation: $27>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18910546/243497210/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.29_MG_b1_all&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGVhNWU2OC0xY2VhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nN-seMDEl85dUPdS5pYmrnTmupJTUIm-a8mhTeez9Ug=)_** ** ** ****

* * *
_Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18910547/243497211/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGVhNWU2OC0xY2VhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nN-seMDEl85dUPdS5pYmrnTmupJTUIm-a8mhTeez9Ug=&emci=f42b04b4-14ea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=34ea5e68-1cea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

We’ve been fundraising for this phase for most of August, and with grassroots support, we can meet the goals we’ve set and start executing our two-month plan. Given the $6.4 million ad buy from the Republican Super PACs in this race, we need to launch sooner rather than later -- so meeting these goals will be critical if we want to roll out our initiatives by early September as planned. Here’s where we stand: FUNDRAISING DEADLINE: August 31, 2020 at MIDNIGHT Days left until the election: 66 days Fundraising goal: $59,000 (80.57% completed) = ** Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. body:
The polls are tightening -- one recent survey showed MJ just one point behind!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fce/7f51f7bc/424b84c4/4efae8b2/3722149320/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fce/7f51f7bc/424b84c4/4efae8b1/3722149320/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200829.1nd__2024__&amount=10")
---
The Texas Senate race is on, Peter. Sen. Cornyn is on the air with TV ads and the polls are tightening -- **one recent survey showed MJ just _one point behind!_** It's clear that we can win this race, but we're going to need this grassroots team's help to do it.

With this race closer than ever, it's crucial that we continue meeting our goals -- just as we've done with every big goal we've set in the past -- so that we can continue building the campaign we need to fight back against Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies.

They've seen the same poll numbers we have, and they're getting scared. **The Koch network is spending millions** to boost Sen. Cornyn ahead of the election, and corporate PACs are pouring money into his war chest.

**We've set a goal of earning donations from 350 new* donors before Monday's end-of-month deadline to fight back. Will you pitch in now to help us do it?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

Together, we can ensure that the U.S. Postal Service is fully funded, we can protect our land and water, we can keep our promise to senior citizens who depend on Social Security, and we can bring accountability to Washington.

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

body:
Mitch is spending MILLIONS to stop me, friend!! |
---
**Friend, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending more against me than any other Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate.**

**_This is the most competitive Senate race in America._** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2490/5b2c1286/3fe0ade9/25f03aa6/693441384/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_29_eom_wsj_pac?refcode=em_2020_08_29_eom_wsj_pac") **It's clear, friend: McConnell, Trump, and the interests they serve know Senator David Perdue's campaign is a _sinking ship_.**

**Ever since Perdue was caught buying protective medical equipment and vaccine stock while misleading the public about COVID-19, he's been in freefall. He got so desperate, he even started running an anti-Semitic attack ad against me.**

**Now Mitch McConnell is spending more to attack me than any other Democratic Senate candidate in the country.**

_But their tricks and smears aren't working. The latest poll found me LEADING the disgraced incumbent 48% to 46%._

Our momentum is off the charts -- but McConnell and his donors are spending gobsmacking sums and throwing the kitchen sink in a desperate last-ditch effort to stop my campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations?=
subject: Celebrate Friday Night with a GOTV Rally Friday Night for Senator Ed Markey!
body:
Join Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, and our own, Roza Calderon for the kick-off! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ee1db2c168&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## **KICK-OFF THE WEEKEND OF ACTION THIS FRIDAY NIGHT!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d923f1e605&e=66979298f9)
---
| _We are kicking off our Weekend of Action for Senator Ed Markey with an Amazing Roundtable of Progressive Champions!_
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ce2e3857d0&e=66979298f9 "RSVP HERE")
---
| **Join Ed Markey, Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, and Future Generations PAC Executive Director Roza Calderón for a virtual rally on Zoom to get out the vote for Ed ahead of the Massachusetts primary!**

We'll hear from top progressive champions, and learn about Ed's vision to move us out of this crisis moment, as well as how you can get involved with Get Out the Vote efforts during this critical home stretch.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f1d1a9ec0f&e=66979298f9)
---
[ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ccb52e611d&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| [SIGN UP TO TEXT](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f9527ff36e&e=66979298f9 "SIGN UP TO TEXT")
---
| [SIGN UP TO CALL](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=654135c35a&e=66979298f9 "SIGN UP TO CALL")
---
| [START MAKING CALLS NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=25e55b7738&e=66979298f9 "START MAKING CALLS NOW!")
---
|
---
|
#### **Senator Ed Markey **is up for re-election and as the co-author of the Green New Deal, he's being challenged.
It's not a secret, Senator Ed Markey placed a huge target on his back the second he co-authored the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. While the nation celebrated such a bold climate and economic proposal, others, like Joe Kennedy III, felt that challenging Senator Markey was the only way to protect his $1.75 million dollars worth of oil stocks with Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Schlumberger.

Needless to say, dark money is pouring into this race fast, and we must fight back. Sign up to make calls to re-elect Ed and give the GND a fair shot!
---
| [TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f41e48f33f&e=66979298f9 "TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.** **
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=01b699504a&e=66979298f9)
---
| The coronavirus pandemic has really changed the way we do politics. Our organization stretches every penny that is donated to keep our operations going and provide the best support to our amazing candidates. From text banking, door hangers, and safety equipment for our team, we count entirely on grassroots donations because we are powered by the People.

_We are youth-founded, organized, and led. We volunteer all of our time to fight for future generations. We thank you for your support._

**With just one week before the September 1st Massachusetts Primary, can you commit to $15 a month until we win in November?**
---
| [Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0c99190e4d&e=66979298f9 "Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations")
---
|
---
|
### A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
We've come a long way! When we founded Future Generations we knew it would be difficult to get going in a sea of organizations. But we set out to be different. We set out to support candidates and incumbents who think not just of making a name for themselves with today's hot topics, but those who truly care about the world we are building for Future Generations to come. While you scroll through this email, I'd like you to ask yourself, "What is the legacy we'll leave behind?"

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director
[Chiara](mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earth)[@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---

clean_body: Join Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, and our own, Roza Calderon for the kick-off! | | | | | | | KICK-OFF THE WEEKEND OF ACTION THIS FRIDAY NIGHT! | | | We are kicking off our Weekend of Action for Senator Ed Markey with an Amazing Roundtable of Progressive Champions! | "RSVP HERE" | Join Ed Markey, Senator Cory Booker, Congressman Ro Khanna, and Future Generations PAC Executive Director Roza Calderón for a virtual rally on Zoom to get out the vote for Ed ahead of the Massachusetts primary! We'll hear from top progressive champions, and learn about Ed's vision to move us out of this crisis moment, as well as how you can get involved with Get Out the Vote efforts during this critical home stretch. | | | | "SIGN UP TO TEXT" | "SIGN UP TO CALL" | "START MAKING CALLS NOW!" | | Senator Ed Markey is up for re-election and as the co-author of the Green New Deal, he's being challenged. It's not a secret, Senator Ed Markey placed a huge target on his back the second he co-authored the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. While the nation celebrated such a bold climate and economic proposal, others, like Joe Kennedy III, felt that challenging Senator Markey was the only way to protect his $1.75 million dollars worth of oil stocks with Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Schlumberger. Needless to say, dark money is pouring into this race fast, and we must fight back. Sign up to make calls to re-elect Ed and give the GND a fair shot! | "TAKE THE GND PLEDGE NOW!" | | | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents. | | The coronavirus pandemic has really changed the way we do politics. Our organization stretches every penny that is donated to keep our operations going and provide the best support to our amazing candidates. From text banking, door hangers, and safety equipment for our team, we count entirely on grassroots donations because we are powered by the People. We are youth-founded, organized, and led. We volunteer all of our time to fight for future generations. We thank you for your support. With just one week before the September 1st Massachusetts Primary, can you commit to $15 a month until we win in November? | "Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations" | | A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO | | We've come a long way! When we founded Future Generations we knew it would be difficult to get going in a sea of organizations. But we set out to be different. We set out to support candidates and incumbents who think not just of making a name for themselves with today's hot topics, but those who truly care about the world we are building for Future Generations to come. While you scroll through this email, I'd like you to ask yourself, "What is the legacy we'll leave behind?" Chiara D'Angelo National Campaigns Director mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earthmailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved.

name: Mark Warner for Senate 2020
subject: Mark Warner is getting attacked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark needs your help to spread his message across Virginia.
|
---

| | Derek --

We've got a simple ask for you today: Can you help Mark Warner spread his message across Virginia?

The election is in just over _two months_ , and we already know it's going to look very different as folks take advantage of no-excuse absentee vote by mail and in-person early voting. Mark and all of Team Warner is working hard to make sure folks have the information they need to keep themselves and their families safe during the coronavirus pandemic.

**We know that Mark is putting in the work -- but his Republican opponent just started attacking him with a new ad.**

We need your help to spread Mark's message across the Commonwealth. | **[Pitch in to help Mark spread his message across Virginia.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db01/53d9897e/55df9489/1c883aaf/2985348834/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200829_f_1_nd__738__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
Mark is campaigning hard this year, but he's also doing his job for the people of Virginia, putting in the work to help our Commonwealth make it through this moment of crisis.

**[We need to send Mark back to the Senate so he can continue to work hard for every Virginian. If you have the means, please help us spread the word about Mark Warner.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db01/53d9897e/55df9489/1c883aae/2985348834/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200829_f_1_nd__738__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you so much for your support!
Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db01/53d9897e/55df9489/1c883aad/2985348834/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200829_f_1_nd__738__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Weekly wrap-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
It's hard to believe that we're already entering September and that the election is just a little over two months away.

Our team has been hard at work knocking on doors and calling voters, with thousands and thousands reached over the last several weeks. If you'd like to join our volunteer ranks, [please sign up here. We'd love to have your help!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=77e9eeeb18&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| Now that both the Republican and Democrat conventions have wrapped up, I think it's clear to all of us that there are **two very different visions for America** on the ballot. **I'm focused on solving problems** , and when I get to Congress, I look forward to working with fellow solutions-oriented Republicans and any Democrats who want to join us.

I'm proud to have received **the endorsements of Nikki Haley and Senator Tim Scott** , who both delivered insuring, optimistic, and hopeful speeches at the Republican Convention this week.
---
|
---
|
### "Texas First" T-Shirts
[](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=2087b83f2f&e=68aaeb0998)We introduced our new campaign shirts last week, and they've been a huge hit so far!

Make sure your Texan pride is on full display, and support our campaign with your own "Texas First" t-shirt. [Click here to order one now.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=e821abb3fe&e=68aaeb0998) Get one (or more) while you still can.
---
|
---
| We've got **a very busy 66 days until Election Day** , and my campaign team and I will be out and about all across the 32nd Congressional District. **We've got a campaign that can go toe to toe with Colin Allred's** campaign, which is backed by the Pelosi money machine. However, [we can always use additional support from folks like yourself](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=63add263cd&e=68aaeb0998). Any amount helps!

I hope you have a great weekend! Please follow us on social media to keep up with the day-to-day, and I look forward to updating you once again with everything that we do in the coming week!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

name: Team Nehls
subject: Fwd: ** 60-Day Victory Drive **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Click or Tap >>
**[🚨](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/d76e80be2c192c47c3d6b838967d376c/35193)[ Help Us Reach Critical August Goal! 🚨](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/b14555fb939b4c75c3d6b838967d376c/35193) ** Friend, This is a quick follow-up and update.

Did you see Troy’s message the other day?

We’ve launched a VITAL online fundraising drive to close out August strong, so we can kick off the 60-day victory drive ready to fight and win!

This race is a top House battleground, as socialists target our district like never before with BOATLOADS of money from far left groups trying to spread lies about Troy’s record and buy our seat.

_This is a MUST-WIN race to ensure our district is represented by someone**who’s served here for decades** and to take back the House from AOC and The Squad!_
The response so far has been strong. But **we still have $18,243 to go** to reach our critical $30,000 goal.

[**Please chip in $5, $10, $25 or more today to help**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/238435753278883fc3d6b838967d376c/35193) We have until midnight on Monday, and EVERY contribution is a huge help.

Sincerely,

Team Nehls | |
---
From: Troy Nehls
Date: Thursday, August 27th, 2020; 5:09 P.M.
To: All Supporters
Subject: ** 60-Day Victory Drive **

Friend,

There has perhaps never been more at stake for our nation – and the 2020 elections are heating up fast.

We’re on the FRONT LINE here in TX-22 to take back the House. We must ramp up.

This open seat race is a top battleground. _**The Pelosi and AOC machine is DESPERATE to “flip” this seat, to protect their grip on power!**_

We’ve set an aggressive August end-of-month goal, and we can’t afford to fall short. We need to raise $30,000 to keep our fight to keep this seat “RED” on track.

Our 60-Day Victory Drive kicks off on September 4th!

**[Will you make a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution to help us reach this vital goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/d50af430985948b0c3d6b838967d376c/35193) **

Every dollar we raise online helps us get out my message, through ads and grassroots efforts, to fire up voters and turn them out on election day.

And if we’re short now, we could ultimately fall short on Election Day...

**Don’t let outsiders buy this seat**. With everything going on in our country, we need someone who’s served our local community for decades and backed by our local community to be our voice in Congress.

Our end-of-month deadline is coming up fast, next Monday at midnight.

**[Respond now, to help us get this effort off to a strong start!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/be24de4a397ce7ccc3d6b838967d376c/35193) **

Thanks, Friend.

\- Troy
[Rush a $5 Donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/df3422decb163afbc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
[Rush a $10 Donation >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a1eea5ee70e4847b/3d1a3ef3d5117b6ac3d6b838967d376c/35193)

name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: Who will stand with our Police?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
We’ve almost reached 100 CONSECUTIVE DAYS of looting, violence, and rioting in our cities. | |
---
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=f485f0f9dd0344c98a28ad98f739cd6a&_e=3xLUERc72FcganzXvKPqFqhilwTeBbPHza97lhHkJ0okrXRQwh574utYcQJemZvZtUbGwGProTn7nX7ZLq5giZbM-RV7uYY6NgUfxN6nVTtwOKBKNaQgGIncnR4F3FelUdDA3ClEnWHq_dUrNn2XMEopGKu2RUlt4FqiB1YroNT_hD-3ZoBVUZ2P4rzz3gInj23gpxzsq6uMtf9oVUU_0TTFiUOcGuSVWdteMsMf2xEu1agtNua-6pJpczPDe7lybhQwuWS3WwXgyYWqrc2eGNgicRvDUp46wKyjBR3NYgClqtojvcMVCPaIqWN7GjqpWhuLBSgmVXxBckLJCeUZJTH8CpcY79DSZW8k_VbFU38XdMc1aAu85SHfeGxmZZRy6I_M2KDTTsyCeEIcNM2Sd64hEfliNH-5oBw1E-B2XpfML9vHqx-DRdaY2jQw5s8P)
Peter,

We’ve almost reached _**100 CONSECUTIVE DAYS**_ of _**looting**_ , _**violence**_ , and _**rioting**_ in our cities. That means 100 very long and tough days for the brave men and women of the NYPD. While New York’s finest are doing their best, despite the anti-police rhetoric coming from the Democratic Party, they need us to be _**VOCAL**_ and _**LOUD**_ in support of them!
[**Defend our Police**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=f485f0f9dd0344c98a28ad98f739cd6a&_e=3xLUERc72FcganzXvKPqFqhilwTeBbPHza97lhHkJ0okrXRQwh574utYcQJemZvZtUbGwGProTn7nX7ZLq5giZbM-RV7uYY6NgUfxN6nVTtwOKBKNaQgGIncnR4F3FelUdDA3ClEnWHq_dUrNn2XMEopGKu2RUlt4FqiB1YroNT_hD-3ZoBVUZ2P4rzz3gInj23gpxzsq6uMtf9oVUU_0TTFiUOcGuSVWdteMsMf2xHW96BaqTsTJIV-kQmx4tEnEWeifyiRtv0H-7S4pGIW4oh4US_oBCle3tCWlgw1vc7AkznTVFusXrF_3lFWl41T0SeFI7XC4Bwt8ByJtEsrixbZWB6vUqlIY4Dj15J6iVITQU2uTeWrRkI9MuEworUd0FSq_Gr5nX-Ln3BEYFPaCJdpD0fmDlb_6_j26n1lF6MQpAJZ9sFP7Xt1SZdU2ZH2)
I’ve made it clear that this wave of violence and unrest against our police departments must be condemned. I’m the only candidate in this race who has been endorsed by:
**✅ Police Benevolent Association of New York State**
**✅ Suffolk County Superior Officers’ Association**
**✅ NYPD Detectives’ Endowment Association**
**✅ New York State Troopers PBA**
**✅ Port Authority PBA**
**✅ Suffolk County Sheriff PBA**
**✅ Suffolk County Police Conference**
**✅ Suffolk County PBA**
**✅ Suffolk County Detectives Association**
**✅ Suffolk County Detective Investigators Association**
I’m not afraid to make it known to Long Island that I’m the only law and order candidate running for Congress in this race! name: Molly Keenan, JayInslee.com
subject: Remember August 2016?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to win.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8138%2E868730%2E44MEY6) Friend, I want to take you back to August 2016, to an NBC News headline: [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10895?t=4&akid=8138%2E868730%2E44MEY6) Hillary Clinton led Donald Trump by 9 points. I know it stings to remember -- but we must remember because the 2016 election taught us that we can't take any win for granted. These poll numbers were unchanged for weeks. It was all but assured Donald Trump would lose because only 17% of all voters said they believed Trump had the personality and temperament to serve effectively. What happened? Trump and his dark money allies spent huge sums to undermine and lie about Secretary Clinton. They unleashed false "October surprises." And they relied on bad actors from across the globe to manipulate our elections. **That's all to say that our campaign can't take anything for granted, including your support. We're asking because it matters, and it makes a huge difference in the fight against the millions on hand from the Republican Governors Association:[Will you donate $5 or more to help us raise $40,000 before Monday's official end-of-month deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10895?t=5&akid=8138%2E868730%2E44MEY6)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10896?t=6&akid=8138%2E868730%2E44MEY6)

I'm falling desperately short of my End of Month fundraising goal.

If I can't raise $7,341 TODAY, I'll be out of cash to pay staff, fund research, and run ads.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e822/77d4c309/2198c597/2635ee36/4119691429/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e822/77d4c309/2198c597/2635ee31/4119691429/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e822/77d4c309/2198c597/2635ee30/4119691429/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Four more years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Thursday I had the distinct honor of attending President Trump's speech at the White House. He spoke of American greatness and gave us a vision for the future, and the choice of who to elect this November could not have been made any more clear. Democrats have spent months campaigning and used their convention to tear down America, tear down proud patriots, and tear down our President. They have used their platform to spread division and negativity - here in America, we don't accept defeat, and we don't tarnish our nation. My opponent is a perfect example of this divisive negativity. He's called us traitors and idiots for supporting our own duly elected President. One scroll down his twitter page reveals someone ashamed of our nation - it is disgraceful. We don't need any more leaders who refuse to acknowledge our nation's greatness, and we certainly don't need another politician whose only agenda is to go to Washington to help Nancy Pelosi attack our President. Unlike Nancy and Nate, I am proud to be an American. I am proud of our nation and all that it has accomplished, and I am looking forward to all we can achieve with a second term for President Trump. I thought our President's speech last night was inspiring and showcased the best we have to offer and the best that is yet to come. He exposed the Democrat's divisiveness, and instead offered a message of unity to all Americans. [That's why I need patriots like each of you, who love our country and support our President to help me ensure he has leaders in Congress to help him. Chip in $10, $25, or $50 today and send our President a strong message that Western New York needs strong conservative leaders.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/DUlGGvJqGE763oKDjFh55SFg/Q7Cq1enVXyV427H9b88F9Q) I couldn't do this without each of you. I am honored to have your support, and I promise to continue to fight alongside our President for our region and our nation. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

clean_body: | Friend, Thursday I had the distinct honor of attending President Trump's speech at the White House. He spoke of American greatness and gave us a vision for the future, and the choice of who to elect this November could not have been made any more clear. Democrats have spent months campaigning and used their convention to tear down America, tear down proud patriots, and tear down our President. They have used their platform to spread division and negativity - here in America, we don't accept defeat, and we don't tarnish our nation. My opponent is a perfect example of this divisive negativity. He's called us traitors and idiots for supporting our own duly elected President. One scroll down his twitter page reveals someone ashamed of our nation - it is disgraceful. We don't need any more leaders who refuse to acknowledge our nation's greatness, and we certainly don't need another politician whose only agenda is to go to Washington to help Nancy Pelosi attack our President. Unlike Nancy and Nate, I am proud to be an American. I am proud of our nation and all that it has accomplished, and I am looking forward to all we can achieve with a second term for President Trump. I thought our President's speech last night was inspiring and showcased the best we have to offer and the best that is yet to come. He exposed the Democrat's divisiveness, and instead offered a message of unity to all Americans. I couldn't do this without each of you. I am honored to have your support, and I promise to continue to fight alongside our President for our region and our nation. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs * 5501 Camp Road P.O. Box 893 Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS

body:
Thanks to strong Republican leadership, Indiana is open for business -- while Democrats in Illinois continue to pursue a path of higher taxes, | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7a4ed0280a)

| **ICYMI: Indiana is Open for Business** **as the Illinois Exodus Continues**
Thanks to strong Republican leadership, Indiana is open for business -- while Democrats in Illinois continue to pursue a path of higher taxes, more regulation and staggering debt.

In case you missed it, check out [this column from the Chicago Tribune](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cf4d20ba01&e=1acd9bb3d6) contrasting Indiana's pro-growth, balanced-budget, low-tax, stable approach with Illinois' Democrat dysfunction:

---
| [Read "Indiana is Open for Business" Here >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=465151c93f&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read "Indiana is Open for Business" Here >>")
---
| _**Excerpts**_** _ from "Indiana is Open for Business as the Illinois Exodus Continues"_
By John Kass**
_“Illinois business owners know that even with all these issues, there are some state officials who care about them. Only they’re not from Illinois. They’re from Indiana...

“There is no hope because there is no political will in Illinois to solve its own problems...

“Indiana had Gov. Mitch Daniels who swung his budget ax years ago and straightened his state out. He was followed by Mike Pence, the vice president, and current Gov. Eric Holcomb. And what did these three accomplish?..

“Indiana property taxes are much lower than Illinois. Indiana has little legacy debt. Indiana pays its bills on time: Illinois currently owes more than $6.5 billion in overdue bills. Indiana’s credit rating is Triple-A from the three main rating agencies while Illinois’ credit rating is near junk. In terms of doing business and livability, Indiana ranks at the top of Midwestern states by U.S. News & World Report for long-term stability and affordability."

“The trial lawyers don’t run Indiana politics."_

---
| | [Read "Indiana is Open for Business" Here >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=98394f7cd7&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read "Indiana is Open for Business" Here >>")

| | Hi team ― Mike’s organizing director here. I’ve been busy building up the field operation we need to flip Texas’ 10th Congressional District. _This kind of round-the-clock work is never easy ― but when you’re fighting every day to elect someone like Mike it isn’t so bad._ I’m reaching out because my team is running a bit low on supplies ― and how much we order depends on if we reach our $50,000 End-of-Month goal or not. There is a lot of excitement here in the district and around the country! _So, I’m really ramping up our operations and I know we have a TON of volunteers signed up to help out!!_ **Long story short: I’m really going to need A LOT more supplies.** Our campaign has gone virtual so we need more phones, more Slack subscriptions, more texts, more literature, and A LOT more people power. **I just asked Nick and it seems like we’re only about 68% of the way to our goal.[ Can I count on you to chip in a triple-matched gift to help us hit our goal so I can make sure we talk to all TX-10 voters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18913510/243568243/1255145819?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200829_EOM11_U1_X1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjM0ODE3Yy0zNmVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSYka6mAN7y73xqLBf86Oct2ApMJEXMr1LZfDZPaT9A=)** | | | [Chip in $25 (x3!) →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18913511/243568244/1255145819?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200829_EOM11_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjM0ODE3Yy0zNmVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSYka6mAN7y73xqLBf86Oct2ApMJEXMr1LZfDZPaT9A=)

name: Tiffany
subject: We were robbed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Yesterday we discovered that our office was broken into during the night. We are thankful that everyone is okay, but now, we are more determined than ever. Arizona gals are not deterred when thugs knock us down. This won’t stop me from fighting to take back the House and stand with President Trump. Friend, I hate to reach out to you again, but after today our campaign office is no longer functional until we reopen -- and to do that we need your support **IMMEDIATELY.** [ clean_body: Friends, Yesterday we discovered that our office was broken into during the night. We are thankful that everyone is okay, but now, we are more determined than ever. Arizona gals are not deterred when thugs knock us down. This won’t stop me from fighting to take back the House and stand with President Trump. Friend, I hate to reach out to you again, but after today our campaign office is no longer functional until we reopen -- and to do that we need your support IMMEDIATELY. Will you chip in now to help us reopen? This incident won’t stop me, and it won’t stop strong Arizonans who are standing up for what’s right. Thank you for your support during this time, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: This deadline is different, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
That's right -- it's a Big Fundraising Deadline. |
---
Peter,

As Joe Biden's finance director, it's my job to make sure this campaign raises the resources it needs to win in November.

**So I mean it when I say that Monday is a BFD. That 's right -- it's a Big Fundraising Deadline.**

After midnight on Monday, our August fundraising totals will be locked in, and we'll learn if we were able to outraise Trump and the Republicans for the first month of the general election with a full ticket.

Peter, I don't need to tell you how good it felt to outraise them in May and June -- or how tough it was to learn they raised more than us in the month of July. We can't let them beat us again this month. If we're going to compete on the airwaves and keep growing this grassroots campaign, we have to hit our fundraising goal in the next two days.

**That 's why Monday's August deadline isn't like any that's come before. It really is a BFD. But right now, we haven't hit our goal of raising $360,000 in Pennsylvania.**

[Peter, can I count on you to make your first donation right now? Any amount you're able to give will make a real difference towards making sure we reach our goal in the next two days:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.29_B2_BFD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.29_B2_BFD_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Peter, this really is a grassroots campaign. Nearly all of our donations come from grassroots supporters like you. That's something I'm proud of.

But with Trump and the Republicans holding their convention this week and fundraisers all month, they're sure to see a huge spike in donations.

That's why we're counting on more grassroots supporters digging deep and chipping in to make sure we don't fall behind this month.

[Can you be one of the donors we still need from Pennsylvania, Peter? Chip in $25 or whatever makes sense for your budget before our Monday deadline.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.29_B2_BFD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.29_B2_BFD_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Katie Petrelius
Finance Director

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b070/1cd0ac28/1524a443e/357097b4/3839934310/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b070/1cd0ac28/1524a443e/357097b2/3839934310/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b070/1cd0ac28/1524a443e/357097b8/3839934310/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b070/1cd0ac28/1524a443e/357097ad/3839934310/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: That's right -- it's a Big Fundraising Deadline. | Peter, As Joe Biden's finance director, it's my job to make sure this campaign raises the resources it needs to win in November. So I mean it when I say that Monday is a BFD. That 's right -- it's a Big Fundraising Deadline. After midnight on Monday, our August fundraising totals will be locked in, and we'll learn if we were able to outraise Trump and the Republicans for the first month of the general election with a full ticket. Peter, I don't need to tell you how good it felt to outraise them in May and June -- or how tough it was to learn they raised more than us in the month of July. We can't let them beat us again this month. If we're going to compete on the airwaves and keep growing this grassroots campaign, we have to hit our fundraising goal in the next two days. That 's why Monday's August deadline isn't like any that's come before. It really is a BFD. But right now, we haven't hit our goal of raising $360,000 in Pennsylvania. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Peter, this really is a grassroots campaign. Nearly all of our donations come from grassroots supporters like you. That's something I'm proud of. But with Trump and the Republicans holding their convention this week and fundraisers all month, they're sure to see a huge spike in donations. That's why we're counting on more grassroots supporters digging deep and chipping in to make sure we don't fall behind this month. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Katie Petrelius Finance Director Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

subject: John Cornyn's new TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Is he serious??

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae8a7/1016266728/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter!

Senator Cornyn just launched a slew of ads trying to paper over his **abysmal** COVID-19 response. It's more important than ever that we hit our end-of-month goal so we can fight back and correct the record with TV and digital ads of our own.

Please, read the message below, and **[pitch in if you can!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae8a6/1016266728/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200829.2nd__1998__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar HQ**
Subject: This race is on
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae8a6/1016266728/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200829.2nd__1998__&amount=10")
> ---
> The Texas Senate race is on, Peter. Sen. Cornyn is on the air with TV ads and the polls are tightening -- **one recent survey showed MJ just _one point behind!_** It's clear that we can win this race, but we're going to need this grassroots team's help to do it.
>
> With this race closer than ever, it's crucial that we continue meeting our goals -- just as we've done with every big goal we've set in the past -- so that we can continue building the campaign we need to fight back against Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies.
>
> They've seen the same poll numbers we have, and they're getting scared. **The Koch network is spending millions** to boost Sen. Cornyn ahead of the election, and corporate PACs are pouring money into his war chest.
>
> **We've set a goal of earning donations from 350 new* donors before Monday's end-of-month deadline to fight back. Will you pitch in now to help us do it?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
