> **[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae89b/1016266728/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200829.2nd__1998__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae89a/1016266728/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200829.2nd__1998__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae899/1016266728/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200829.2nd__1998__")**
> \-- Team MJ
>
>
>
> _*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._
>
>
> [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fc8/7f51f7bc/42414603/4efae8a6/1016266728/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200829.2nd__1998__&amount=10")

subject: Crucial deadline
body:
| | | |

| Friends,

We are quickly approaching our end of the month fundraising deadline.

As we saw on Thursday night with President Trump, this will be the most important election of our lifetime. Getting this election wrong will mean higher taxes, a Green New Deal and other radical policies. Our opponent will be nothing but a rubber stamp for Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and AOC.

That is why we need the resources to fight back and beat them. We have a crucial fundraising deadline on Monday and we still need to raise $7,283.

[Click here to donate $100, $25 or even $50 today to help us defeat the radical left.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=1672e03091&e=16fac31a0f) We are counting on you!

Thank you for your support!

Austin Harris
Campaign Manager

disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Did you hear her comments about Republicans earlier this week? She labeled us... [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=0b6e214e73be4dcb8584edcd22881421&_e=l8xL-7bIQau0PKLXESP7gcFik4dPxz5mL1LAj8qFjnce_KFapNDbemsx0gzXZRE7gRb6NGh-pO1iI2AmZ47R-wPtfEgaqe-cDllXShZ-IJ3oGABD1ucNUG1m4Sm-E6SW1YYt8qA8o6HArqygu_CHtFWA92z8tiMolASefZulBhlqFgjV5W4iJft7KeHfDIIrKD8OKxr4zehInoyxIy0JPm_SwTAFrWvKHy7xmV-PmJs2W0dIikrcEfrsmIP5744XEGZ2LhnNRbCmjJAFKXblqIabcE4Hmc7X0m0CSZhw5a1mPXGbZCkOJlzUUvZYOPDZnqZrbgug1L26f5x3iRX5CVi1BJ-CdCrrIhelmBSb1WTvm1WKOtiIuh_P5Kbsoc4a1Vtxt3RlAgMY1Kr6ksduXnbSEl9e5uXF4j4OAJGhLgyZEGLu1Pme6iAlDgbWiD0bhI7jn0CifQLRM26SrbDX2QVPFg2SD7xZTgu_jrfW8XJWpcM3r1JxT4ph6OyAcYZv) | |
---
Friend,

Dysfunction, division, and obstruction in Congress have reached all-time highs under Nancy Pelosi’s leadership – and it’s only getting worse by the day.

_Did you hear her comments about Republicans earlier this week?_

**She labeled us as “enemies of the state” after we refused to go along with her $25 billion bailout of the postal service.**

Americans in all 50 states are sick and tired of Pelosi’s partisanship holding back American progress at a time when Congress needs to be coming together and finding solutions to lead the country forward.
[**CHIP IN TO FIRE NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=0b6e214e73be4dcb8584edcd22881421&_e=l8xL-7bIQau0PKLXESP7gcFik4dPxz5mL1LAj8qFjnce_KFapNDbemsx0gzXZRE7gRb6NGh-pO1iI2AmZ47R-wPtfEgaqe-cDllXShZ-IJ3oGABD1ucNUG1m4Sm-E6SW1YYt8qA8o6HArqygu_CHtFWA92z8tiMolASefZulBhlqFgjV5W4iJft7KeHfDIIrKD8OKxr4zehInoyxIy0JPm_SwTAFrWvKHy7xmV-PmJs2W0dIikrcEfrsmIP5744XEGZ2LhnNRbCmjJAFKXblqIabcE4Hmc7X0m0CSZhw5a2wHP50lTMvj86bViZT3FoN7caTxDIa8tpCiUMtXMBMoIQVI2PrwkY-a2itz8XQUXwzycSbKzLo_wyEB-rIvF9l_Iz6XuhYB1S8XjWKuqJcg_m_gPnzx3fIrSuARsDEbpANLhNiSqcspfEJB2JZDrFbT7IxXIu1doZ2Iv5yF1lfY4gkr0bhJz82A7zHk5-Ovns-Wdq5c2_FjsSjCtUMvUO2)
November 3rd is our chance to turn the page, right the ship, and get Congress back on track for years to come – but we’re rapidly running out of time in this fight.

Friend, Election Day is right around the corner, August is coming to a close this week, and our end of month fundraising deadline is staring us down.

Firing Nancy Pelosi on November 3rd isn’t going to be an easy fight – but it’s a fight that we can’t afford to lose. Can I count on you to join us before it’s too late?
[**CHIP IN $10 TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=0b6e214e73be4dcb8584edcd22881421&_e=l8xL-7bIQau0PKLXESP7gcFik4dPxz5mL1LAj8qFjnce_KFapNDbemsx0gzXZRE7gRb6NGh-pO1iI2AmZ47R---8ELS0hwpeEZ8HRhnCSD7flVKhH_cxBfHC-9BPPIlBuDycRY8fz6yhu0oswVNtzydYZOI18Ob2cqdETj6DpIfEQjGHCB7_p5wFNQuCsKh5_bimVsbKBb86tJ_nwIt6tnASd3lBZ3eLnbXdfRFJ9Q9w4Wwj0lQc2PZfLLGb64iLIZNotzC4K37s4YGlNcw79z6uEo7Xot7WSWp0RaYHl5w7EWocTHZz6-A44jYL6L-eV3ndI0uEJxdwmAzGwNYjOZJuFHXnJwqwpjWYCkoD9AkH307Vo_8vZGS2_4-rwLgGCZhYmimAAK5U-AlBBoWW28PF51v7_6r4RSkWMCwNU9X3l1m_YyAGDYZfObFQhLr6lXqpFGQXiUSSEWNHbg7RIJT82tNeFLAIj4r4_6KWRPhBk2Or48iBWxZjrp0CTBXf)

clean_body: Did you hear her comments about Republicans earlier this week? She labeled us... | | Friend, Dysfunction, division, and obstruction in Congress have reached all-time highs under Nancy Pelosi’s leadership – and it’s only getting worse by the day. Did you hear her comments about Republicans earlier this week? She labeled us as “enemies of the state” after we refused to go along with her $25 billion bailout of the postal service. Americans in all 50 states are sick and tired of Pelosi’s partisanship holding back American progress at a time when Congress needs to be coming together and finding solutions to lead the country forward. November 3rd is our chance to turn the page, right the ship, and get Congress back on track for years to come – but we’re rapidly running out of time in this fight. Friend, Election Day is right around the corner, August is coming to a close this week, and our end of month fundraising deadline is staring us down. Firing Nancy Pelosi on November 3rd isn’t going to be an easy fight – but it’s a fight that we can’t afford to lose. Can I count on you to join us before it’s too late? Thank you for your support, Darin LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Bill Olson
subject: No more media bullies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

The President has been telling us for years and years about the disgusting injustice of the media. They exist to tear the American people down, to promote their far-Left agenda.

I truly believe many of them are evil people.

But none of their antics are worse than what they did to Nick Sandmann, the Covington Catholic student (a high school kid).

The media, especially CNN and the Washington Post, immediately attacked this kid. They incited violence; death threats to him and his family forced the family to go into hiding and the school to close temporarily.

In a word, these grown adults were trying to destroy this kid- to cancel him. This is what the far-Left media does.

They lie, they destroy, they incite, and they do everything they ever can to avoid telling the truth.

But they had never yet met the indomitable Nick Sandmann!

Like a pro, Nick and his lawyers savaged CNN, the Washington Post, and two dozen other Fake News media outlets. While the exact amounts due to Sandmann are unknown, it is telling that Wikipedia now refers to Nick as the "owner of CNN"!

I was in tears when I saw Sandmann speak at the Republican National Convention this week.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

Nick Sandmann, an 18-year-old graduate from Covington Catholic High School who was at the center of a nationwide viral video controversy, lambasted "cancel culture" in his speech to the Republican National Convention, calling on the country to join President Trump in calling the media out.

"I wouldn’t be canceled. I fought back hard to expose the media for what they did to me and won a personal victory. While much more must be done, I look forward to the day that the media returns to providing balanced, responsible and accountable news coverage," he said. "I know President Trump hopes for that too."

He continued: "In November, I believe this country must unite around a president who calls the media out and refuses to allow them to create a narrative instead of reporting the facts. I believe we must join with a president who will challenge the media to return to objective journalism."

Nick is now a freshman in college. And while he will be CNN's highest paid employee for many years, it took guts to come and speak out about our unethical attack dog media.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

The media are dedicated to the complete destruction of America, and they are equally devoted to the destruction of every single American who loves freedom and loves our country!

Here's the good news: The American people see the media for what it is!

A new poll released on Tuesday shows Americans have a growing distrust of the media, with an overwhelming majority saying the press have a political bias and nearly half saying news outlets display a "great deal" of bias.

The poll noted an increase in the percentage of Americans who see too much bias in ostensibly objective reporting as a "major problem." According to the poll, 73 percent of Americans share that belief, up from 65 percent in 2017.

Meanwhile, a stunning 84 percent of Americans agree that "the media is to blame for political division in this country," though the same percentage also believe the media "can serve as a healing force."

Nearly nine out of ten Americans agree with Nick Sandmann about the faults of the media. But they only win if we let them! That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

I'm an unapologetic patriot, unlike Joe Biden. Darren Soto sure as heck is not- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time! He's a puppet of the extreme Left.

This very week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". Knowing the history that led up to World War II, this should send chills down the spines of all Americans.

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have crazy Pelosi's money, which is why I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

I am calling all Trump patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.eD8oBJMF6OuRU&b=wVx9v4kcvVVLHr7Hp1342Q
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2a1/18e32a7f/4a1586c5/7b20fb73/3137086904/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2a1/18e32a7f/4a1586c5/7b20fb70/3137086904/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2a1/18e32a7f/4a1586c5/7b20fb71/3137086904/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2a1/18e32a7f/4a1586c5/7b20fb7d/3137086904/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2a1/18e32a7f/4a1586c5/7b20fb7f/3137086904/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2a1/18e32a7f/4a1586c5/7b20fb76/3137086904/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: still missing a response from Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're closing off responses at midnight |
---
Peter,

You've now seen both parties' conventions, and boy was the difference big between the two.

While our convention focused on giving the American people hope for a better path forward, the Republican National Convention anchored itself in fear and division.

Now, there are less than ten weeks until Election Day, and our campaign is determined to keep pushing a positive vision for the future in everything that we do.

**That includes all of our online content for the remaining 66 days of this race, and that's why we're hoping to get as many responses to our Post-Convention Survey as possible, so we know what content from the convention you found most enjoyable and effective!**

[But, Peter, we still don't see a response from you on this important survey and we're closing off responses at midnight. Can you add your feedback right now?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f87/2892829193/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns") | **Team Joe Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f87/2892829193/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
**Response to Post-Convention Survey?** No -- not yet!
**Deadline:** Midnight
**Average Survey Completion Time:** 2-4 minutes, [click here to begin >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f87/2892829193/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
---
| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f86/2892829193/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.29_B3_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
---
Thanks for weighing in -- and being an important part of the team!

Biden-Harris 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f85/2892829193/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f84/2892829193/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f83/2892829193/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f82/2892829193/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f81/2892829193/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709f80/2892829193/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7f/2892829193/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7e/2892829193/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7d/2892829193/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7c/2892829193/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7f/2892829193/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7b/2892829193/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7e/2892829193/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08c/1cd0ac28/152797fe2/35709c7a/2892829193/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Mark Warner
subject: We need a real change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Dear Derek --

Folks are saying this a lot these days, but it's true: we're living through an extremely challenging time.

We're facing three crises right now: a global pandemic that has already killed more than 170,000 Americans, systemic racism in our justice system, and record unemployment numbers.

We have a sitting President who has made known he might not accept the election results, and whose administration has set out to undermine the U.S. Postal Service -- a service millions of Americans rely on. And that's just in the last few months in a four-year pattern of incompetence and cruelty.

Instead of providing real answers to the American people, Republicans in the Senate seem determined to make matters worse by stalling coronavirus aid and delaying meaningful criminal justice reform. I know my constituents are looking for answers -- and frankly I was hoping for more actual leadership from the administration. It's become clear that we're just not going to get it while Republicans control the Senate and the White House.

**We need a real change -- we need leaders who listen as much as they talk and are ready to bring real solutions to folks across the country.**

And we have a chance to make that real change in this election. I believe it's one of the most consequential of our lifetimes -- and I'm not just saying that because I'm on the ballot. We have the opportunity to replace Donald Trump with Joe Biden, and elect (and re-elect) Democrats up and down the ticket.

There's a real path to flipping the Senate this year, and I know that my seat plays a big role in that. It just isn't possible to take back control of the Senate if we don't hang onto the seats we've already got.

**[So if you have the means, please consider making a contribution to help me keep my seat in the Senate and keep working for the people of Virginia.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db03/53d9897e/55d99910/1c883ae1/533572468/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-chipin?refcode=20200829_f_2_nd__736__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

For everything you've done and everything you will do, I deeply appreciate your effort and support.

-- Mark Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db03/53d9897e/55d99910/1c883ae0/533572468/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-chipin?refcode=20200829_f_2_nd__736__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

| Friend,

Democrats have been fighting to flip Texas blue for years -- and _we’re closer than ever to getting the job done._

**Texas is running an incredible slate of candidates who have been putting in the work to engage their communities, create broader and stronger coalitions, and change the political landscape for the better.**

We know Sri Preston Kulkarni is one of those candidates. A former diplomat and lifelong public servant, he made history in 2018 by building an incredibly diverse coalition of new voters and using that strategy to run the closest race his historically-Republican district had seen.

**Sri will finish the job, win in November, and join an inspiring group of people who will go to Washington and champion working families all across Texas -- and[we’re asking you to split a contribution between him and Democrats running for office all across our state to power our movement to flip Texas blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18915280/243645959/386066087?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.29_b2_TTSri_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTNmNWE5MS01OGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL7_Git8tVT_sRb0bT2A3WEBYwUOJj340VzEoi_KgsI=)**

From dropping out of school to care for his father, who suffered from cancer, to eventually graduating with a Master’s degree and working to promote American values as a diplomat, **Sri’s work has been defined by his dedication to making his community and country a better place.**

And that’s exactly why we need him in Congress.

**The work that Sri and the other Democrats running for office in Texas have been doing is changing the fabric of our state. And, your support is what makes all of it possible.**

Democrats running for office up and down the ballot this cycle all have stories rooted in those same values, and now more than ever, we need those values -- from expanding access to affordable health care to rebuilding our economy so it works for working families -- representing us.

We don't want to have to even think about budget cuts.

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fca/7f51f7bc/42447a01/4efae882/3457718409/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | The next few days are crucial, Peter. There are only two months between now and Election Day, and as we execute the final stages of our campaign plan it's absolutely critical we hit our end-of-month goal. We don't want to have to even _think_ about budget cuts.

With recent polling showing us **just one point behind** , we're putting things into overdrive. We need to reach out to voters across every inch of Texas (and let me tell you, Texas has a lot of inches!), but that's going to take big-time resources.

I'm so grateful for each and every one of the 140,000+ fighters who have pitched in to our campaign so far, but now I need your help. **[Please pitch in if you can to help us crush our end-of-month goal, and let's win this thing!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fca/7f51f7bc/42447a01/4efae881/3457718409/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200829.3nd__2000__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Joe and I are calling some folks who pitch in to fill this gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
When we say this is your campaign, we mean it. |
---

Peter, last month Democrats had a pretty big gap between our fundraising and Trump and the RNC's -- $25 million, in fact.

When we're fighting for every vote, that could have some pretty big consequences for us on Election Day, especially in big battleground states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, Arizona, and yes, Texas.

So our team set a high August goal to close that gap, but we can't hit it before our public fundraising deadline on Monday night without your support, Peter.

**It 's so important that we bring in $337,500 more from first-time donors in Pennsylvania over the next 48 hours that Joe and I are going to call some of the folks who chip in to thank them personally for helping us hit this goal.**

[Will you be one of the folks I need from Pennsylvania to stand with me and Joe today, Peter? Chip in below and you could be one of the people we call and thank personally.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoeandkamala_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.29_B4_KDHeomcalls_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.29_B4_KDHeomcalls_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
How spineless! |
---
Real quick, friend. **We are coming up against a huge fundraising deadline in a little over 48 hours.**

The GOP continues to give in to racist and anti-Semitic tropes. Last month, Jon Ossoff's opponent, David Perdue, ran an anti-Semitic attack ad that digitally altered the size of Jon's nose.

There's been nothing nearing ownership from Perdue since then. Instead Perdue -- a sitting Senator -- claimed he was the real victim.

_How spineless!_

**Friend, we're trying to raise $100,000 by the end of the month for Jon to stay on track to beat Perdue this November.**

**[Will you make a donation RIGHT NOW to fight back against Perdue's disgusting campaign tactic and send him into an early retirement?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24b6/5b2c1286/3810fbab/25f038b6/649190391/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_27_jo_as_an?refcode=em_2020_08_29_jo_as_an_k")**

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (personal)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** August 27, 2020
**Subject:** One month since my opponent's anti-Semitic ad

Friend,

It's been a month since my opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue, got caught running an anti-Semitic attack ad that doctored a photo of my face to lengthen my nose.

**The Senator blamed an outside vendor and took no responsibility. David Perdue is a coward, and he's fully embraced the Trump playbook -- deny, deny, deny, and the buck always stops elsewhere.**

_In fact, Perdue claimed victimhood and implied that since he had visited Israel, he couldn't be an anti-Semite._

Anti-Semitism is on the rise, unfortunately. Just last week, someone painted six swastikas in Cobb County here in Georgia.

**Our leaders should be healing this country and working to oppose racism, sectarianism, and prejudice -- not participating in it and then claiming victimhood.**

Georgia deserves a Senator with a conscience and a spine. Georgia deserves better than David Perdue.

**[Friend, I will lead with tolerance, unity, and compassion. Please, make a donation to my campaign to defeat David Perdue.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e24b6/5b2c1286/3810fbab/25f038b6/649190391/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_27_jo_as_an?refcode=em_2020_08_29_jo_as_an_k")**
